evals.prompt: 生成今天的海外大模型每日情报
evals.expected_output: Should run the full pipeline: fetch data from 8 radars, generate 3-board report (commercialization, data engineering, application innovation), and distribute to Feishu/Ruliu

evals.prompt: 帮我配置海外AI日报的环境，我不知道怎么获取API key
evals.expected_output: Should walk through the .env.example file, explain each required API key, and guide user to register for RapidAPI, set up Feishu app, and configure LLM endpoint

evals.prompt: 我想先测试一下报告生成，不要发如流和飞书
evals.expected_output: Should run with --no-distribute flag, generate the report file without distributing, and show the user the output path
